'''''Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two''''' is a [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|Roleplaying Game]] book written by [[John Terra]], published by [[West End Games]] in [[1992]].

It was set [[6 ABY/Legends|two years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

{{Book-stub}}
